name: JFrog Artifactory
description: Monitor JFrog Artifactory artifact repository for secure package management and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your JFrog Platform at your instance URL
2. Go to Administration → Identity and Access → Access Tokens
3. Generate a new Access Token with Read scope
4. Copy the token and your instance URL below

credentialFields.label: Access Token or API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an Access Token in JFrog Platform → Administration → Identity and Access → Access Tokens

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies JFrog Artifactory repositories are configured for secure artifact storage

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews JFrog Artifactory users and their access permissions
